appraisal_events.evidence: « Votre ami nous plaît beaucoup… Il est simple, charmant… vous pouvez les amener. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme Verdurin praises Odette's friend (Swann) and explicitly authorizes his continued presence, signaling acceptance into the valued salon circle.

status_effects.explanation: Explicit invitation to return marks his acceptance and inclusion in the Verdurin salon.
